title: lastrea invisa
intro: Lastrea invisa, also known as the Invasive Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Lastrea invisa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
